description.ko: 복잡한 음향 주파수를 빛과 기하학적 형상의 매혹적인 춤으로 번역하여 소리의 보이지 않는 구조를 탐구하는 몰입형 디지털 여정입니다.
description.en: A captivating digital journey that translates complex acoustic frequencies into a mesmerizing dance of light and geometry, exploring the invisible architecture of sound.

prompt: Abstract 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, rhythmic pulse waves, glowing neon particles, fluid harmonic oscillations, deep midnight blue and iridescent violet color palette, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed digital art style, 8k resolution.
